intended_use: Brain WMH is intended for automatic labeling, visualization, and volumetric quantification of WMH from T2w FLAIR MR images. The output consists of segmentations, visualizations and volumetric measurem
intended_use_full: Brain WMH is intended for automatic labeling, visualization, and volumetric quantification of WMH from T2w FLAIR MR images. The output consists of segmentations, visualizations and volumetric measurements of WMH. It is intended to provide the trained medical professional with complementary information for the evaluation and assessment of MR brain images and to aid the trained medical professional in quantitative reporting.
target_condition: White matter hyperintensities on brain MRI
ground_truth: Multiple experts: three experts served as truthers and one expert as an adjudicator
other_metrics: Dice coefficient: 0.58 ± 0.21; Longitudinal validation: 97.1% correctly labelled; Scan-rescan reproducibility: consistent volumes between short-interval, same-subject study pairs
